node.statement: E5 (right, two-hole term h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a}). h_{a,a}=a^2-P(a^2)=-q_{a,a} and h_{b,a}=b‚ąėa-P(b‚ąėa)=-q_{b,a}, where q_{r,s}=P(r‚ąės)-r‚ąės (def square-hole). So h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a}=q_{a,a}‚ąėq_{b,a}. Apply GT-HH (two-hole) with (r,s)=(a,a) and (u,v)=(b,a): ||P(q_{a,a}‚ąėq_{b,a})||<=C eta||a||¬∑||a||¬∑||b||¬∑||a||=C eta||a||^3||b||. Since eta<=eta_0<=1 we have eta<=sqrt(eta), so ||P(h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a})||<=C eta||a||^3||b||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. CONCLUSION: ||P(h_{a,a}‚ąėh_{b,a})||<=C eta||a||^3||b||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Uses GT-HH, def square-hole.
